title: Reinwardtiodendron anamalaiense
taxonomy: Reinwardtiodendron anamalaiense is a species of flowering plant in the family Meliaceae. It is native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India and is known to thrive in subtropical climates. As a member of the Meliaceae family, Reinwardtiodendron anamalaiense is closely related to other meliaceous plants such as the neem tree and the mahogany tree. The classification of Reinwardtiodendron anamalaiense is further refined to the genus Reinwardtiodendron, which is part of the Sapindales order in the angiosperm family classification system. This classification helps to identify and understand the unique characteristics of Reinwardtiodendron anamalaiense within the plant kingdom.
